query:
INSERT INTO voice_sessions (user_id, channel_id, server_id, session_id)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
            ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE
                SET channel_id    = EXCLUDED.channel_id,
                    server_id     = EXCLUDED.server_id,
                    session_id    = EXCLUDED.session_id,
                    joined_at     = now(),
                    last_seen_at  = now(),
                    last_active_at = now(),
                    alone_since   = NULL,
                    is_muted      = false,
                    is_deafened   = false
            RETURNING
                id,
                user_id,
                channel_id,
                server_id,
                session_id,
                joined_at,
                last_seen_at,
                is_muted,
                is_deafened
